mapper.select: select t1.* from metadata_datasource_info t1 inner join metadata_table_info t2 on t1.id = t2.datasource_id and t2.model_status = 1 where t1.model_status = 1 and t2.id = #{tableId}
select t.* from metadata_datasource_info t where exists (select 1 from metadata_table_info t1 where t.id = t1.datasource_id and t1.id in #{id})
